login.heading: Sign in
login.description: Sign in with your URJC institutional credentials.

roles.heading: Sign in as a test role
roles.description: Prototype only: each button opens a session with a mocked user of the given role.

route.heading: Request a route
route.instructions: Pick origin and destination inside the highlighted perimeter (500 m around each URJC campus).

origin.label: Origin
origin.placeholder: Type an address or click on the map

destination.label: Destination
destination.placeholder: Type an address or click on the map

list.heading: Proposed routes
list.empty: Set origin and destination, then tap «Calculate route».

picker.title: Pick a companion
picker.subtitle: The person you pick will receive your real-time location while the trip is active.
picker.noContacts: You don't have any trusted contacts yet. Add some in Profile.

panel.heading: Active trip
panel.simulatedPauseActive: Simulated pause: {{seconds}} s of {{threshold}} s before prealert.

confirmCancel.title: Cancel this trip?
confirmCancel.message: Companion mode will be closed and location sharing will stop.

companion.heading: What your companion sees
companion.label: Is here
companion.alertReceived: An alert notification has been received.

prealert.title: Are you okay?
prealert.message: Something unusual has been detected during your trip. Confirm you're okay before the alert escalates.

alert.banner: Alert sent to the Security Service. We're with you.

terminal.completed: You've arrived at your destination. Nice work!

contacts.heading: Trusted contacts
contacts.description: People who will receive alert notifications during a trip.
contacts.empty: You don't have any trusted contacts yet.
contacts.name: Name
contacts.invalid: Enter a name (≥2 chars) and a phone (≥4 chars).

thresholds.heading: Prealert thresholds
thresholds.description: Tune when the app detects a possible incident during a trip.

pause.label: Max pause time
pause.description: How long you can stay still before it's considered an incident.

deviation.label: Max deviation distance
deviation.description: Distance from the planned route before it's considered a sharp deviation.

volunteer.heading: Volunteering
volunteer.description: Offer to virtually accompany other people during their trips.
volunteer.active: You are registered as a volunteer
volunteer.activeDescription: Others can now pick you as a companion when starting companion mode.
volunteer.inactiveDescription: Enable volunteering to appear in the list of available companions.

lighting.label: Broken streetlight
lighting.hint: Lamp off, faulty or providing insufficient light.

feeling.label: Lonely / fear zone
feeling.hint: Feeling of insecurity, low footfall or isolated spot.

obstacle.label: Obstacle on the path
obstacle.hint: Objects, vegetation or elements blocking the way.

accessibility.label: Accessibility barrier
accessibility.hint: Step, broken pavement or other accessibility issue.

incident.descriptionPlaceholder: Any detail that could help staff locate and fix the incident.

modal.title: Report an incident
modal.subtitle: Thanks for helping improve campus safety.

page.heading: Report an incident
page.description: Pick a point on the map or use your current location and continue with the form.
page.mapLabel: Map to select the incident location
page.pickHint: Click the map to choose the incident location.
page.success: Incident reported. Thanks for helping improve campus safety.

fab.label: Report an incident during the trip

errors.missingCategory: Pick an incident type to continue.

admin.heading: Administration panel
admin.description: Management of reported incidents and escalated alerts.

security.heading: Security Service panel
security.description: Received alerts and security tickets forwarded by admin.
security.noTickets: No tickets assigned to the Security Service.

maintenance.heading: Maintenance Service panel
maintenance.noTickets: No tickets assigned to the Maintenance Service.

errors.outOfCoverage: That point is outside the coverage perimeter (500 m around the URJC campuses).
errors.missingEndpoints: You need both origin and destination before calculating a route.
errors.geocoding: Address suggestions could not be fetched. Try again.
errors.geolocationUnavailable: Your device does not support geolocation.
errors.geolocationFailed: Could not retrieve your location. Try again.
